content: Fixed timestep accumulator pattern (Gaffer On Games 'Fix Your Timestep'): deposit elapsed real time into an accumulator each frame, then consume fixed-size sim-tick chunks from it while enough time remains. Spiral of death occurs when a sim step takes longer wall-clock time than the sim-time it simulates, causing the accumulator to grow and trigger ever more catch-up steps in a feedback loop, eventually freezing the app. Standard mitigation: clamp max steps-per-frame (or max accumulator size) so the sim visibly slows down under load rather than spiraling.
